inputs.corpus: 44 observations. The agent edited a symbol's definition then hit 6 compile errors at call sites it had not searched for first. In 5 later cases it grep'd for all references before editing the definition and changed every call site in one pass with no follow-up errors.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 3 active rules, none about pre-edit reference discovery.

rule_under_test.name: grep-references-before-renaming
rule_under_test.content: Before changing or renaming a symbol, search the codebase for all references so every call site is updated in the same change.

expected_judgment.rationale: A recurring, well-grounded friction pattern (edit-then-discover-call-sites) with observed successful recoveries that apply exactly this rule. Normal everyday positive.
